title: Muscarella intonsa
taxonomy: Muscarella intonsa is classified within the family Pleurothallidinae, which is a subtribe of orchids. It belongs to the genus Muscarella, a group of small to medium-sized epiphytic orchids. The species Muscarella intonsa is native to Central and South America, adding to the geographical distribution of its genus. The classification of this species is based on its unique characteristics, such as its inflorescence structure and floral morphology. The precise classification of Muscarella intonsa is further supported by its phylogenetic analysis.
